scripts.text:
--DELETE FROM ZML.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL_NEW WHERE DATE >= GETDATE()-15;

TRUNCATE TABLE ZML.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL_NEW;

INSERT INTO ZML.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL_NEW
(DIVISION	,
SESSION_ID	,
CALL_ID	,
CONTACT_ID	,
CallResultId	,
MarketID	,
ProductID	,
LeadSubSourceID	,
TIMESTAMP	,
DATE	,
HOUR	,
TIME	,
CALL_TYPE	,
CAMPAIGN_TYPE	,
CAMPAIGN	,
SKILL	,
LIST_NAME	,
AGENT_GROUP	,
AGENT_NAME	,
AGENT	,
CUSTOMER_NAME	,
ANI_CODE,
ANI,
DNIS	,
CALLS	,
ABANDONED	,
CONTACTED	,
LIVE_CONNECT	,
NO_PARTY_CONTACT	,
SPEED_OF_ANSWER	,
SERVICE_LEVEL	,
CALLS_COMPLETED_IN_IVR	,
COMPANY	,
CUSTID	,
LEAD_ID	,
CONTACT_CREATE_DATE_TIME	,
NUMBER1	,
NUMBER2	,
NUMBER3	,
ANR_LOGIT_RANK	,
LANGUAGE	,
LPRECTYPE	,
LPRECKEY	,
DATEUPLOADED	,
NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS	,
LOCAL_ANI	,
AB_TEST	,
CALL_TIME	,
DIAL_TIME	,
RING_TIME	,
TIME_TO_ABANDON	,
MANUAL_TIME	,
HANDLE_TIME	,
CONSULT_TIME	,
QUEUE_CALLBACK_WAIT_TIME	,
PREVIEW_TIME	,
AFTER_CALL_WORK_TIME	,
TOTAL_QUEUE_TIME	,
QUEUE_WAIT_TIME	,
HOLD_TIME	,
TALK_TIME	,
PARK_TIME	,
IVR_TIME	,
RECORDINGS	,
LAST_UPDATED_TS	,
Data_Identifier	,
DIVISION_ORIG	,
LP_LeadID	
)


SELECT A.DIVISION 
     ,A.SESSION_ID 
     ,A.CALL_ID 
     ,A.CONTACT_ID 
     ,COALESCE(B.CallResultId,B1.CallResultId)           AS CallResultId
     ,COALESCE(C.MarketID      ,C1.MarketID )               AS MarketID  
     ,COALESCE(D.ProductID   ,D1.ProductID)                    AS ProductID 
     ,(E.LeadSubSourceID )      AS LeadSubSourceID 
     
     ,A.TIMESTAMP 
     ,A.DATE 
     ,A.HOUR 
     ,A.TIME 
     ,A.CALL_TYPE 
     ,A.CAMPAIGN_TYPE 
     ,A.CAMPAIGN 
     ,A.SKILL 
     ,A.LIST_NAME 
     ,A.AGENT_GROUP 
     ,A.AGENT_NAME 
     ,A.AGENT 
     ,A.CUSTOMER_NAME 
     --,A.ANI_CODE 
     --,A.ANI 
     --,A.DNIS 
		,Replace(CASE WHEN TRY_CAST(A.ANI_CODE AS DECIMAL(38,0)) 	IS  NULL THEN NULL ELSE  [ANI_CODE] END,'.','')  AS ANI_CODE
		,CASE WHEN TRY_CAST(A.ANI AS DECIMAL(38,0)) 		IS  NULL THEN NULL ELSE  [ANI] 		END AS ANI
		,CASE WHEN TRY_CAST(A.DNIS AS DECIMAL(38,0)) 		IS  NULL THEN NULL ELSE  [DNIS] 	END AS DNIS	
     --DISPOSITION 
     ,A.CALLS 
     ,A.ABANDONED 
     ,A.CONTACTED 
     ,A.LIVE_CONNECT 
     ,A.NO_PARTY_CONTACT 
     ,A.SPEED_OF_ANSWER 
     ,A.SERVICE_LEVEL 
     ,A.CALLS_COMPLETED_IN_IVR 
     ,A.COMPANY 
     ,A.CUSTID 
     ,A.LEAD_ID 
     ,A.CONTACT_CREATE_DATE_TIME 
     ,A.NUMBER1 
     ,A.NUMBER2 
     ,A.NUMBER3 
     ,A.ANR_LOGIT_RANK 
     --MARKET 
     --PRODUCT 
     --SOURCEGROUP 
     --SOURCE 
     --SUBSOURCE 
     ,A.LANGUAGE 
     ,A.LPRECTYPE 
     ,A.LPRECKEY 
     ,A.DATEUPLOADED 
     ,A.NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS 
     ,A.LOCAL_ANI 
     ,A.AB_TEST 
     ,A.CALL_TIME 
     ,A.DIAL_TIME 
     ,A.RING_TIME 
     ,A.TIME_TO_ABANDON 
     ,A.MANUAL_TIME 
     ,A.HANDLE_TIME 
     ,A.CONSULT_TIME 
     ,A.QUEUE_CALLBACK_WAIT_TIME 
     ,A.PREVIEW_TIME 
     ,A.AFTER_CALL_WORK_TIME 
     ,A.TOTAL_QUEUE_TIME 
     ,A.QUEUE_WAIT_TIME 
     ,A.HOLD_TIME 
     ,A.TALK_TIME 
     ,A.PARK_TIME 
     ,A.IVR_TIME 
     ,A.RECORDINGS 
     ,A.LAST_UPDATED_TS 
     ,A.Data_Identifier 
     ,A.DIVISION_ORIG 
     ,A.LP_LeadID
FROM ZML.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL A
LEFT JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION] B 
     ON COALESCE(A.DISPOSITION,'NULL-DEFAULT') = B.CallResult 
     AND A.DIVISION = B.DIVISION
     
LEFT JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION] B1
     ON COALESCE(A.LP_DISPOSITION,'NULL-DEFAULT') = B1.CallResult 
     AND A.DIVISION = B1.DIVISION
     
LEFT JOIN ZML.DIM_FIVE9_MARKET C 
     ON COALESCE(A.Market,'NULL-DEFAULT') = C.Market 
     AND  A.DIVISION = C.DIVISION
     
LEFT JOIN ZML.DIM_FIVE9_MARKET C1
     ON COALESCE(A.LP_BranchID,'NULL-DEFAULT') = C1.Market 
     AND  A.DIVISION = C1.DIVISION
     
     
LEFT JOIN ZML.DIM_FIVE9_PRODUCT D 
     ON COALESCE(A.Product,'NULL-DEFAULT') = D.ProductName 
     AND  A.DIVISION = D.DIVISION
     
LEFT JOIN ZML.DIM_FIVE9_PRODUCT D1 
     ON COALESCE(A.LP_Product,'NULL-DEFAULT') = D1.ProductName 
     AND  A.DIVISION = D1.DIVISION
     
     
LEFT JOIN ZML.DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING E 
     ON       COALESCE(A.SOURCE,A.LP_SourceCode,'NULL-DEFAULT')                = COALESCE(E.SOURCE,'NULL-DEFAULT')
     AND  COALESCE(A.SOURCEGROUP,A.LP_SourceGroup,'NULL-DEFAULT')      = COALESCE(E.SOURCEGROUP,'NULL-DEFAULT')
     AND  COALESCE(A.SUBSOURCE,A.LP_LeadSubSource,'NULL-DEFAULT')      = COALESCE(E.SUBSOURCE,'NULL-DEFAULT')
     AND A.DIVISION =E.DIVISION

WHERE A.DATE >= GETDATE()-700;
